name: Sarthak Bhosale
title: Computer Engineering Student · AI & ML · Cybersecurity · Full-Stack
summary: Tech enthusiast and engineering student passionate about building intelligent, secure, and connected systems. Hands-on experience from an AI internship at Accenture and a Cybersecurity virtual internship at Cisco, with proficiency spanning machine learning, Python, full-stack MERN development, IoT systems, and network security. Thrives on complex problems and leading collaborative teams to deliver innovative, real-world solutions.
